query: SELECT pq.categoryId, COUNT(*) as count FROM position_questions pq WHERE pq.categoryId IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5) GROUP BY pq.categoryId;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46m8FvVm7HSsc1z.root --database 6XmnMHSGkmqmcvGw6sxZ3M --execute SELECT pq.categoryId, COUNT(*) as count FROM position_questions pq WHERE pq.categoryId IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5) GROUP BY pq.categoryId;
